author: zcstarr
content: <@962726279336046633> https://github.com/open-rpc/spec-types/releases/tag/go%2Fv0.0.3 should be good to go . Missed this floating through . Nice catch!

author: boma_naps
content: Hey  the fix is right but the tag name needs the full sub-path: could you re-tag commit 90f1c373 as generated/packages/go/v0.0.3 so Go module resolution can find it?

author: zcstarr
content:
Actually yeah a few things actually popped up in the build, there was an artifact that was published with an older build system, that was still tagged on the repo which prevent us from using latest properly and just kind of mucked up the tag system, I had to bump to a greater minor version to correct things. 

Long story short I reset the tags and the versioning is now from the minor version 0.1.1 going forward 

github.com/open-rpc/spec-types/generated/packages/go v0.1.1

and then go get latest will now resolve properly as well . 

just let me know if you hit further issues.

author: boma_naps
content: I will check this again and get back to you if any issues
